# testing-kits

Compact public navigation map. This file is descriptive only; operating rules live in `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and `SECURITY.md`.

## Start here

- [README.md](./README.md): public landing page and proof baseline.
- [docs/DOCS_MAP.md](./docs/DOCS_MAP.md): documentation reading paths.
- [docs/HARNESS_READING_GUIDE.md](./docs/HARNESS_READING_GUIDE.md): harness reading and dossier shape.
- [HARNESS_INVENTORY.md](./HARNESS_INVENTORY.md): harness catalog.
- [HARNESS_ROADMAP.md](./HARNESS_ROADMAP.md): shipped batches and next safe work.

## Proof language

Use `77 harnesses` for inventory size. Use TEETH `required` / `pending` / `legacy` status for proof strength. Re-run gates before using loaded counts as fresh claims.
